title: caroxylon glabrum
intro: Caroxylon glabrum, also known as the "Coastal Saltbush" or "Glasswort", is a succulent shrub native to coastal areas in Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Caroxylon glabrum lie in its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation, making it useful for treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and arthritis. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its high levels of antioxidants and its ability to help regulate electrolyte balance, which can lead to improved overall health and reduced risk of chronic diseases. Caroxylon glabrum can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
